nasb.text: These will pay the penalty of eternal destruction, away from the presence of the Lord and from the glory of His power,

esv.text: They will suffer the punishment of eternal destruction, away from the presence of the Lord and from the glory of his might,

ccb.text: 那些人要受的刑罚就是离开主的面和祂荣耀的权能，永远灭亡。

csbs.text: 他们将受到刑罚，就是永远的灭亡，从主面前被隔绝，离开他权能的荣耀。
